news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] New data centers built through 2033 could consume as much electricity as India uses today.

news.title: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. could sanction Chinese open AI models over alleged IP theft, expanding the Trump administration's campaign to slow China's AI advances.

news.title: AI in medicine: model makers need a Marketing 101 lesson-focus on what customer need must be met
news.description: [LIVEMINT] Artificial intelligence promises much in the field of healthcare. But too much of what’s on offer is not oriented to the needs of medical practice, but crafted by what data AI has access to. What doctors want solved should be the aim.

news.title: World shares mostly gain
news.description: [CP24 TORONTO] World shares mostly gained and U.S. futures advanced on Tuesday, with markets trading higher in South Korea and Japan led by technology shares after recent declines due to heavy selling of stocks linked to artificial intelligence.
